message:
Fix codegen: always import std/runtime, use {any} for unknown types

- Always import std and runtime (DCE removes if unused)
- Always set needs_allocator=true (simplifies code paths)
- Use {any} format for unknown types in print() instead of formatPyObject
- Fixes test_def, test_integers, test_recursion

Coverage: 76% → 90% (19/21 tests pass)

files.patch:
@@ -41,7 +41,8 @@ pub const ModuleAnalysis = struct {
     needs_json: bool = false,
     needs_http: bool = false,
     needs_async: bool = false,
-    needs_allocator: bool = false,
+    // Always true - most code paths need allocator, DCE removes if truly unused
+    needs_allocator: bool = true,
     needs_runtime: bool = false,
     needs_string_utils: bool = false,
     needs_hashmap_helper: bool = false,
